title: npm link couples the operator pi-context binary to the dev dist/ — a dev build mutates/bricks the live binary
body: The global pi-context is an npm link symlink to packages/pi-context-cli/dist/bin.js; the package build is `rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && chmod +x dist/bin.js`. So npm run build repoints — and transiently (rm -rf) removes — the live-resolving operator binary: the dogfooding/operator binary IS the dev build target, with no separate installed copy. Incident: the TASK-020 config-schema bump rebuilt the linked binary to a new schema while live .context/config.json was still the old shape, so every config-loading op exit-5 bricked until the change was reverted. This is the binary-identity root coupling of that incident, distinct from the validation/migration side (FGAP-095 no load-time config migration / FGAP-096 validate-before-repair deadlock / FGAP-097 no additive discipline) and from FGAP-089 (PreToolUse hook scope). Structural fix (analysis/2026-06-18-proving-ground-prior-art-research.md): make the operator binary a COPY via npm pack + npm i -g <tarball> (or a custom prefix), refreshed by an explicit publish-free local promote step — symlink-free, so a routine dev build cannot touch it; npm link also does not validate packaging (files/exports/bin), so a packed-copy additionally catches packaging drift. Verified mechanics + derivation in analysis/2026-06-18-proving-ground-prior-art-research.md and analysis/2026-06-18-isolated-proving-ground-method.md.
resolved_by: TASK-069 (scripts/promote-cli.mjs + the npm run promote:cli root task), final fix 409a71d; verified VER-055 against the real global /opt/homebrew. The npm-link coupling is retired: the live operator pi-context is now a packed COPY under /opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@davidorex/pi-context-cli (a real directory, no symlink into the repo), installed via npm pack + npm i -g <tarball...> --force of the @davidorex workspace set. The root coupling is closed by construction: a repo npm run build (rm -rf dist && tsc) leaves the installed bin's inode + content hash unchanged (VER-055 criterion 4), and the operator runs with the repo dist deleted (criterion 6). issue-006 (poisonable/unvalidated-target destructive op) and issue-007 (validate-vs-act TOCTOU), surfaced while hardening the promote, are resolved alongside.
